place: Na Mueang, Laem Sor, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84140, Thailand
title: Beachside Eco Pool Villa Community with Wellness Clubhouse - Laem Sor
blurb: A pre-launch community of 17 eco-conscious private pool villas on Laem Sor Beach, on Koh Samui’s quiet southern coast. Three- and four-bedroom homes of 316–424 m² with private pools, wrapped around a wellness clubhouse with an onsen, hot and cold plunge pools, a gym, sauna and rooftop restaurant. Off-plan, completing 2027 — freehold or 30-year lease, from ฿18,000,000.
detail:
A pre-launch development of just 17 private pool villas set on Laem Sor Beach, on the tranquil southern coast of Koh Samui. Designed around an eco-conscious, contemporary aesthetic — clean white forms, natural materials and generous glazing that opens each home to the light, the gardens and the sea.

Three villa types span three to four bedrooms. Type 1 offers three bedrooms plus a flexible mezzanine (configurable for up to five beds) across 379–424 m² of usable space; Types 2 and 3 are four-bedroom homes of 316–390 m². Every villa has a private pool, three or more parking spaces, and 3.5 to 5 bathrooms, on plots of roughly 283–354 m².

At the heart of the community is a wellness clubhouse: an onsen and hot-and-cold plunge pools, a fully equipped gym, sauna and steam rooms, a sunken lounge and a rooftop restaurant overlooking the coast. The setting is one of Samui’s most peaceful — a short drive from Lamai and the Kamalaya wellness sanctuary, with the island’s dining and amenities within easy reach.

Under active construction with completion targeted for 2027, offered freehold or on a 30-year registered lease (with renewal provisions). Pre-launch pricing from ฿18,000,000; individual villa availability, sizes and freehold pricing confirmed on the current price and inventory sheet.

features.l: On Laem Sor Beach, south Koh Samui
